label: yes

Then, take 6 steps left. Now, left is the opposite of right, so if right is positive x, left is negative x. Moving 6 steps left from (3, -1) would subtract 6 from the x-coordinate. 3 - 6 = -3. So, the position is now (-3, -1). Next, take 1 step forward. Forward is still the positive y-direction. So, moving 1 step forward from (-3, -1) would take me to (-3, 0). Finally, take 3 steps right. From (-3, 0), moving 3 steps right (positive x-direction) adds 3 to the x-coordinate. -3 + 3 = 0. So, the final position is (0, 0), which is the starting point.
